name: Snake-Eyes Snigar
sd_appearance: A wiry, hunchbacked goblin of approximately 3 feet in height, Snake-Eyes Snigar, stands tall amidst a crowd. His skin, a dusky green hue, is adorned with intricate tattoos of coiling serpents. His large, bat-like ears twitch as he listens intently, eyes that glow a startling yellow surveying the scene. He wears jade green and black divine silk robes with a coiled serpent motif, a pendant of a contract seal hanging around his neck. A mace and a holy symbol rest at his side, vestments light and padding visible beneath his robes. A glint from a small, concealed dagger catches the light, a reminder that even the most peaceful of beings can carry a hidden edge.
faction_visual: jade green and black divine silk robes, coiled serpent motif, contract seals as pendants
style_note: faction's divine colours, symbol prominently displayed
